<!--------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

Button handling, debouncing, EXTI emulation, GPIO, I2C, PWM, QSPI, RTC, SPI, UART, and watchdog drivers for nRF5.


## Files
- **[button.c](button.c.md)**: Button handling functions for reading, initializing, and testing button states on nRF5 hardware.
- **[debounced_button.c](debounced_button.c.md)**: Implements debouncing logic for button inputs with timer-based sampling and event generation.
- **[exti.c](exti.c.md)**: Implements EXTI emulation using GPIOTE for NRF5, including pin configuration and interrupt handling.
- **[gpio.c](gpio.c.md)**: Functions for initializing and setting GPIO pins on NRF5 hardware.
- **[i2c_hal.c](i2c_hal.c.md)**: I2C hardware abstraction layer implementation for NRF5 microcontrollers with initialization and transfer functions.
- **[i2c_hal_definitions.h](i2c_hal_definitions.h.md)**: Defines the I2CBusHal structure for I2C bus configuration and initialization.
- **[pwm.c](pwm.c.md)**: PWM driver implementation for initializing, setting duty cycle, and enabling PWM on nRF5 microcontrollers.
- **[qspi.c](qspi.c.md)**: Implements QSPI flash operations for nRF5, including initialization, read, write, erase, and power management.
- **[rtc.c](rtc.c.md)**: Real-time clock (RTC) management for nRF5, including timekeeping, timezone handling, and rollover detection.
- **[spi.c](spi.c.md)**: Implements SPI bus and slave port initialization, deinitialization, and data transfer functions.
- **[spi_definitions.h](spi_definitions.h.md)**: Defines SPI configuration structures and enumerations for direction, polarity, phase, and flags.
- **[uart.c](uart.c.md)**: UART driver implementation for nRF5 series, including initialization, configuration, and DMA support.
- **[uart_definitions.h](uart_definitions.h.md)**: Defines UART device and state structures, and declares an IRQ handler for UART devices.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Watchdog driver for NRF5 microcontrollers, including initialization, start, feed, and reset flag management.
